content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:12 shows user-facing label "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.
Pierre: Apple reviewers flag copy that admits a shipped feature is unfinished or unstable, since it suggests the build isn't release-ready. Here the string is visible to end users in Settings, not just a code comment, so it counts as store-facing UI language. Consider rewording to describe the feature's behavior/limitations without using "Experimental" (e.g. "AI Sort is a new feature; you can turn it off if needed").
